title: Triaristellina tenuissima
taxonomy: Triaristellina tenuissima is a species of fungus in the family Agaricaceae. It belongs to the genus Triaristellina and is classified in the kingdom Fungi. The classification of Triaristellina tenuissima is further detailed in the phylum Ascomycota and the class Pezizomycetes. This classification is based on the characteristics and features of the fungus, which are typical of its family and genus. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
uses: Triaristellina tenuissima, a species of lichen, has been reported to have potential medicinal properties. However, there is limited research available on its specific uses.
